title: M.Phil / Ph.D Jobs 2026 – Management Trainee
vacancies: 10 Posts (6 Management Trainee + 4 Management Trainee Admin)
shortInfo: IIM Mumbai has published the Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 notification to fillup 10 Management Trainee posts. Apply online by June 16. Salary ₹35,000 -45,000. Check eligibility, age limit, selection process, important dates, and apply online link here.

basic_details.job_title: IIM Mumbai Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
basic_details.total_vacancies: 10 Posts (6 Management Trainee + 4 Management Trainee Admin)
basic_details.short_information: IIM Mumbai has published the Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 notification to fillup 10 Management Trainee posts. Apply online by June 16. Salary ₹35,000 -45,000. Check eligibility, age limit, selection process, important dates, and apply online link here.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 32 years; extendable up to 35 years for Ph.D. candidates or candidates with relevant experience. Age relaxation applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD as per Central Government rules.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications and parameters specified by IIM Mumbai:

selection_process: Will be communicated to shortlisted candidates via email
how_to_apply: Visit the official IIM Mumbai careers page: https://iimmumbai.ac.in/careers.
Fill out the online application form completely with accurate details. No rounding off of percentage marks is permitted.
Provide a valid and active email ID, as all communications regarding the selection process will be sent exclusively via email.
Submit the online application on or before June 16, 2026 by 5:00 PM.
Regularly check the IIM Mumbai website (www.iimmumbai.ac.in) for updates, amendments, and corrigendum.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for IIM Mumbai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is June 16, 2026, by 5:00 PM.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in IIM Mumbai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 10 total vacancies, including 6 Management Trainee and 4 Management Trainee (Admin) posts.

faq.question: What is the salary for Management Trainee at IIM Mumbai?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of ₹35,000 to ₹45,000, along with additional allowances such as housing, travel, and mobile reimbursement.

faq.question: What is the age limit for IIM Mumbai Management Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 32 years, extendable up to 35 years for Ph.D. candidates or those with relevant experience.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for IIM Mumbai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Master’s degree with at least 60% marks or a B.Tech/equivalent degree from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Is prior experience required for IIM Mumbai Management Trainee posts?
faq.answer: Experience is not mandatory, but prior experience in higher education, EdTech, research, admissions, or student support will be an advantage.

faq.question: What is the duration of the contract for Management Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The initial contract is for 1 year, extendable year-to-year up to 3 additional years based on performance.

seo_tags: Indian Institute of Management Mumbai Management Trainee Recruitment 2026
